iti65:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti65:2.1: “Monks, there are these three kinds of good conduct.
iti65:2.3: Bodily good conduct, verbal good conduct, mental good conduct.
iti65:2.4: These are the three kinds of good conduct.”
iti65:4.1: not having done what’s not skillful,
iti65:4.3: at the break-up of the body,
iti65:4.4: the discerning one reappears in heaven.
